decisions.summary: Scope reviewability confirmed: two status-honesty fixes with one shared intent (CLI output must match observed evidence); review_owner_map: src/merge-manager.js + src/execution-state.js (merge reconcile) and src/design-ssot.js + src/cli.js (init totals) are owned by this story's single reviewer; blast radius bounded by the 11 declared allowed_paths
decisions.reason: All changed files serve the single decision question of status honesty. gate:scope_boundary passed proving the diff matches the declared scope; the two sub-fixes share the same failure mode (status contradicts evidence) and the same test file, so splitting would duplicate fixtures without improving reviewability.
